title: Switch Statement
description: Implement a switch statement to handle multiple user roles.
problemStatement:
Write a `switch` statement for the variable `role := "admin"`. If it's `"admin"`, print `"Full Access"`. If it's `"user"`, print `"Limited Access"`. For anything else, print `"No Access"`.

**Requirement:** Do not use `break` (it's implicit in Go!).
hints: The `default` keyword handles all cases not explicitly listed.
